project_request: AI autocomplete engine that indexes the codebase and provides context-aware completions.

questions.question: How should suggestions be displayed to the developer?
options: Both: ghost text for top suggestion, list for alternatives
questions.answer: Both: ghost text for top suggestion, list for alternatives

questions.question: Should there be a confidence indicator on suggestions?
How should the user dismiss or cycle through suggestions?
options: Escape to dismiss, Tab to accept
Arrow keys to cycle, Enter to accept
questions.answer: Configurable keybindings with sensible defaults (Tab accept, Escape dismiss, Alt+] cycle)

questions.question: Should there be a visual indicator showing indexing status?
options: Status bar + progress during initial indexing
questions.answer: Status bar + progress during initial indexing
